tickers.title: Tickers
tickers.description:
Comma-separated. You can leave both blank and use only indices/FX.

Examples: `005930, 000660`
• 6-digit KR codes default to KOSPI (e.g. 005930).
• Add `.KQ` suffix for KOSDAQ (e.g. `035720.KQ`).
• US symbols are used as-is (e.g. `AAPL, MSFT`).

data_description.kr_tickers: e.g. 005930, 000660 — 6-digit codes = KOSPI; add .KQ for KOSDAQ

disclosures.title: OpenDart disclosures (optional)
disclosures.description:
OpenDart is Korea FSS's free corporate disclosure system. A binary_sensor turns ON when a watched company files a new disclosure.

**You can skip this step entirely** — only the disclosure feature is disabled; everything else still works.

To enable:
1. Sign up at [OpenDart](https://opendart.fss.or.kr/uss/umt/EgovMberInsertView.do) → request an API key (instant, free)
2. Enter your key and the stock codes (e.g. `005930`) below — corp_codes are auto-resolved

data_description.opendart_api_key: Get one at https://opendart.fss.or.kr → API Key request menu
data_description.disclosure_stock_codes: e.g. 005930, 000660 — auto-resolved to corp_codes via OpenDart's company.json
data_description.disclosure_corp_codes: 8-digit OpenDart company ID (e.g. 00126380). Leave blank if you used stock codes above

error.invalid_api_key: OpenDart key is not valid. Verify it at opendart.fss.or.kr.

init.title: KR Finance Kit options
init.description: Edit values entered at setup. OpenDart key: [opendart.fss.or.kr](https://opendart.fss.or.kr)

data_description.disclosure_corp_codes: 8-digit OpenDart company ID; leave blank if you'll re-add by stock code
